discovery: Despair CAN be applied as an aura via specific support gems or uniques

curse_apply_as_aura_mechanic.effect: Curse is applied as an aura to nearby enemies instead of requiring manual cast
implications_for_sanguine: Frees up a skill gem slot (Despair manual cast no longer needed)
Despair becomes automatic around character (no rotation click required)
Enables more aggressive skill gem linking for Hexblast

gems_with_curse_aura_capability.name: Reap
gems_with_curse_aura_capability.link: Can link Despair as a support to Reap
gems_with_curse_aura_capability.caveat: Reap is a direct damage spell; not Hexblast-focused

gems_with_curse_aura_capability.name: Exsanguinate
gems_with_curse_aura_capability.link: Can link Despair as a support to Exsanguinate
gems_with_curse_aura_capability.caveat: Exsanguinate is a projectile; different playstyle than Hexblast

gems_with_curse_aura_capability.name: SupportReapersInvocationPlayer
gems_with_curse_aura_capability.description: Support gem that grants curse_apply_as_aura to the main skill
gems_with_curse_aura_capability.impact: IF this support links to Hexblast, Despair becomes automatic
gems_with_curse_aura_capability.priority: HIGHEST - verify if this is Reapers Invocation support

scenario_1_reapers_invocation_exists.effect: Hexblast casts automatically trigger a Despair aura effect
scenario_1_reapers_invocation_exists.optimization: Use freed slot for additional Hexblast support or movement skill
scenario_1_reapers_invocation_exists.caveat: MUST verify Reapers Invocation is a real support in patch 0.5.x

scenario_2_item_based.setup: Unique item with 'Despair applies as an aura' mod
scenario_2_item_based.example: Would read: 'Despair applies as an aura when socketed in this item'
scenario_2_item_based.gear_slot: Could be body armour, gloves, or helmet
scenario_2_item_based.caveat: No known uniques grant this yet; would be endgame chase item

scenario_3_passive_node.setup: Blood Mage ascendancy or tree passive: 'Curses apply as auras'
scenario_3_passive_node.likelihood: POSSIBLE - Blood Mage could have a node for this
scenario_3_passive_node.caveat: Would be a powerful node; check ascendancy tree

impact_if_despair_aura_works.hexblast_setup: Current 6-link could remain, OR upgrade to:
impact_if_despair_aura_works.dps_impact: +5-10% from auto Despair aura (no activation delay)
impact_if_despair_aura_works.playstyle_impact: One-button rhythm (Hexblast only) instead of two-beat (Despair → Hexblast)
impact_if_despair_aura_works.survivability: Potential safety trade-off; aura is passive (no escape timing)

research_actions_needed.task: Verify SupportReapersInvocationPlayer is a real support gem in patch 0.5.x
research_actions_needed.source: Check skill_gems_v2.json for gem details and links
research_actions_needed.impact: If real, changes entire Hexblast support setup

research_actions_needed.task: Check if Blood Mage ascendancy has a node for 'Curses apply as auras'
research_actions_needed.impact: Would be a passive way to enable auto-Despair

research_actions_needed.task: Search unique items database for 'curse_apply_as_aura' mods
Test the mechanic: Link Despair to Reap or Exsanguinate with aura support
research_actions_needed.impact: Validate that curse aura works as expected with Despair

pros: Full control over timing (can delay for specific targets)
No passive survival risk (can position before casting)
Freed skill gem slot (+1 support for damage)
cons: Passive application (not instant, might miss fast mobs)
No escape timing (always active, passive survival)
Depends on support gem or item availability

next_steps.immediate: Verify if Reapers Invocation support exists and what it does
next_steps.if_exists: Test with Hexblast + Reapers Invocation + Despair in PoB2
next_steps.if_works: Update build-specification.json to use aura-based Despair

sources: poe2-mcp/data/game/skill_gems/skill_gems_v2.json (curse_apply_as_aura stat found in Reap, Exsanguinate, SupportReapersInvocationPlayer)
